node.statement: N2 (FORWARD spectral defect). Let Q be row-stochastic (GT-hyp / def-stochastic: Q>=0 entrywise, Q1=1) with ||Q^2-Q||<=eta, eta<=eta_0<1/4. By N1 (1.1), ||Q||=max_i ||q_i||_1 = max_i sum_j Q_ij = 1 (rows are probability vectors: Q>=0 and Q1=1 give row sums 1). Set S:=2Q-I. Then S1=2(Q1)-1=2*1-1=1, and ||S||<=2||Q||+||I||=2+1=3 (N1 triangle, ||I||=1). Also S^2-I=(2Q-I)^2-I=4Q^2-4Q+I-I=4(Q^2-Q), so ||S^2-I||=4||Q^2-Q||=4 eta <= 4 eta_0 < 1 (GT-small-eta-threshold: the eta<1/4 threshold; here ||S^2-I||=4eta<1 exactly matches Kitaev's ||X^2-I||<=4delta<1 under P->Q, delta->eta).
